description: Unidentified document in Arabic script, probably legal. There are statements about witnessing toward the bottom, including the name Sinān(?) al-ʿAsqalānī al-Tājir in the market of [...] in Fustat. Underneath, it looks like an order to pay 9 dinars to someone, but this wouldn't fit with the legal text above. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
